name: Test Suite Generator
description: Generate comprehensive test cases for your code

agents.name: Code Analyzer
agents.purpose: Analyze code to identify testable functions and edge cases
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the code. Identify all public functions, their inputs/outputs, edge cases, error conditions, and integration points that need testing.

agents.name: Test Writer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write unit tests covering: happy paths, edge cases, error handling, and boundary conditions. Follow testing best practices. Use descriptive test names.

suggestion_card.title: Test Generator
suggestion_card.subtitle: Generate test cases for your code

author: agentfactory
